LAW AND MOTION 301, MOTION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE WAS HEARD AND TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION ON 01/23/04. RULING: RESPONDENT BONTA'S REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE IS DENIED; THE MOTION FOR PEREMPTORY WRIT OF MANDATE IS GRANTED; PEREMPTORY WRIT OF MANDATE SHALL ISSUE PURSUANT TO CCP 1094.5 AND 1085; PETITIONER'S REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE OF THE MANUAL OF CRITERIA FOR MEDI-CAL AUTHORIZATION IS GRANTED; ANY REQUEST FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS SHALL BE MADE PURSUANT TO CRC 870.2. (301/PHA)
MINI-MINUTES FOR JAN-23-2004 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER LARGAESPADA, RAMON RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT BONTA, DIANA M DIRECTOR OF THE DEPARTMENT OF HEALTH SERVICES THIS IS A JUDGMENT DIRECTING ISSUANCE OF PEREMPTORY WRIT OF MANDATE COMMANDING RESPONDENT TO SET ASIDE HER DECISION OF OCTOBER 3, 2003 AND TO DIRECTING RESPONDENT AND HER AGENTS, ETC. TO CEASE UTILIZING, ADMINISTERING OR ENFORCING ANY RULE OR POLICY BARRING AUTHORIZATION OF LIVER TRANSPLANTS SOLELY ON THE BASIS THAT THE CLAIMANT RECEIVES METHADONE MAINTENANCE TREATMENT. RESPONDENT SHALL FILE A RETURN TO THE PEREMPTORY WRIT NO LATER THAN 20 DAYS AFTER SERVICE OF THE WRIT. (SEE SCANNED DOC)
MOTION FOR ATTY'S FEES & COSTS, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF LARGAESPADA, RAMON HEARING SET FOR MAY-07-2004 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 305
